title: Claude Certified Architect Prep
description: Master the five domains of the Anthropic Claude Certified Architect — Foundations exam with hands-on practice and a full-length practice test.

pods.title: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration
pods.description: Design production agentic loops, multi-agent coordinator patterns, and session management — the largest exam domain at 27%.

pods.title: Tool Design & MCP Integration
pods.description: Craft tool descriptions that guide reliable selection, structure error responses for intelligent recovery, and configure MCP servers for production agent workflows

pods.title: Claude Code Configuration & Workflows
pods.description: Master the layered configuration hierarchy, custom commands, execution strategies, and CI/CD patterns that turn Claude Code from a generic assistant into a team-aligned development partner

pods.title: Prompt Engineering & Structured Output
pods.description: Apply explicit criteria, few-shot prompting, tool_use schemas, validation-retry loops, and the Batch API — 20% of the exam.

pods.title: Context Management & Reliability
pods.description: Handle context window limits, escalation criteria, crash recovery, and information provenance — 15% of the exam.

pods.title: Certification Practice Exam
pods.description: A full-length 60-question practice exam mirroring the real test format, with detailed answer explanations and an auto-scoring Colab notebook.
